action.reasoning: Observation: 0.84 balanced accuracy with ConvNeXt-Tiny. Few-shot acc is 0.77, dragging overall score. Analysis: Need stronger backbone and better handling of tail classes. Decision: Switch to CLIP ViT-B/16 (stronger pretrained features), add TTA in predict.py, use focal loss, better LR schedule with warmup, train 40 epochs.
